verse_text: 'For Israel is a child, and I loved him, And out of Egypt I have called his children.

pericope.title: Israel Will Return to the Lord

links.context: Out of Egypt I called my Son refers first to Israel being brought out of captivity ([[HOS.11:1]]). In the OT, "son" can refer to the whole nation of Israel. Here Jesus fulfills this calling as the true Son of God by coming out of Egypt.

symbolic.title: Returning to the Garden of Eden
